name: Partner order sync (template)
description: Import via Shopify Flow. When an order is paid with a partner discount code, update the matching Partner metaobject stats. No customer PII is stored.
steps: For each discount code on the order, find Partner metaobject where coupon_code matches
Increment orders_lifetime, add order total to revenue_lifetime
If order is in current month, increment orders_month and revenue_month
Prepend { date, revenue, commission } to activity_log (max 20 entries, no customer fields)
Send email to partner email and admin (Shopify Email / Flow Send email)
